items.title: Ecuador deploys 75,000 soldiers and police to combat drug gangs
items.dek: Citizens of the most violent-wracked provinces have been warned the government is "at war" with the gangs.

items.title: French national jailed for 10 years in Azerbaijan for spying
items.dek: Martin Ryan was accused of collecting secret information about Baku's military co-operation with Turkey and Pakistan.
